// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
using System.Linq;

namespace TestAssembly
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Extension methods for registering services from TestAssembly.
    /// </summary>
    public static class TestAssemblyServiceCollectionExtensions
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Registers all default services.
        /// </summary>
        public static IServiceCollection AddTestAssembly(this IServiceCollection services)
        {
            services.AddKeyedScoped<global::TestNamespace.MyService>("myKey", (global::System.IServiceProvider sp, object? key) =>
            {
                var f_p0 = sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.ILogger>();
                var f_p1 = sp.GetRequiredKeyedService<global::TestNamespace.IConfiguration>("config");
                return (global::TestNamespace.MyService)global::TestNamespace.MyServiceFactory.Create(sp, "myKey", f_p0, f_p1);
            });
            services.AddKeyedScoped<global::TestNamespace.IMyService>("myKey", (global::System.IServiceProvider sp, object? key) =>
            {
                var f_p0 = sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.ILogger>();
                var f_p1 = sp.GetRequiredKeyedService<global::TestNamespace.IConfiguration>("config");
                return global::TestNamespace.MyServiceFactory.Create(sp, "myKey", f_p0, f_p1);
            });

            return services;
        }
    }
}
